shared_properties: The strip is authored for fixed bottom-center UI placement with crisp borders and high contrast against the stage.
Core palette metadata remains primary #5C3317, background #2B1B17, and accent #D4AF37 while timing-zone colors appear inside specs.colors_hex.
The art leaves clean rectangular regions for perfect and good timing communication.
differences: The strip contains a cyan perfect zone nested inside wider lime good zones framed by a navy-gold container.
Tick marks emphasize the reflect boundary without introducing text dependency.
The bar stays visually restrained so moving projectiles remain the primary rhythm cue.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the duel loop, projectile attributes, UI layout, and Bevy runtime constraints for Reflect Academy.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the warm academy hall mood, layered duel composition, and luminous spell contrast.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load timing_bar_precision_strip.png during Loading and spawn it as a bottom-center UI image.
runtime_notes: Keep the bar in UI coordinates so it remains stable during camera shake.
Animate only the projectile cursor or marker, not the authored strip texture.
Leave the center of the strip uncluttered so the perfect zone stays instantly legible.

context.usage: Always visible while projectiles are active to communicate the precision timing window.

acceptance_criteria: Canvas is exactly 600x30 px with transparent pixels outside the bar silhouette.
The perfect zone remains centered and visibly narrower than the good zone at 50% preview scale.
Gold border thickness stays consistent along the entire strip.
